common.appDescription: A blog platform for campus communities

discover.noPostsHint: Be the first to share your insights

discoverHome.heroTitle: What is everyone talking about on campus today?
discoverHome.heroSubtitle: Start with the stories, events, and opinions moving across schools right now.

views.recommendedHint: A balanced mix of active campus stories and standout posts.
views.latestHint: Freshly published posts, sorted by newest first.
views.sameSchoolHint: A tighter stream built around the busiest school in the current feed.
views.nearbySchoolsHint: Sample one story from more campuses before diving deeper.

empty.filteredHint: Try another discovery tab or come back after the next post lands.

school.noPosts: No posts in this school yet
school.noPostsHint: Be the first to publish an article
school.notFoundHint: This school does not exist or has been disabled

editor.imageUploadError: Failed to upload the image. Please try again.
editor.publishError: Failed to publish. Please try again.
editor.draftError: Failed to save draft. Please try again.
editor.schoolRequiredDraft: Please choose a school before saving your draft.

toolbar.heading: Heading
toolbar.outlineEmpty: Add headings to generate an outline

editor.quotaExceeded: This article exceeds your publishing quota.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your Campus Blog account to publish posts, manage your writing flow, and access your personal dashboard.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register a Campus Blog account to publish your campus news.
auth.loginError: Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials and try again.
auth.registerError: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again.
auth.emailVerificationRequired: Verify your email before signing in.
auth.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
auth.resendVerificationSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox for the new link.
auth.verifyPendingSubtitle: Your account was created, but you need to verify your email before you can finish signing in.
auth.verifySuccessSubtitle: Your account is ready. You can now sign in and continue to your destination.
auth.verifyErrorSubtitle: This verification link is missing, expired, or has already been used. Request another email and try again.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a reset link if the account is eligible.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If the email can be used for password recovery, a reset link has been sent.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Set a new password for your account using the reset link you received.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can sign in with the new password now.
auth.resetPasswordTokenError: This reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new password reset email.

emailTemplates.fallbackURLLabel: If the button does not work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:

resetPassword.intro: Use the secure link below to reset your CampusBlog password.
resetPassword.subject: Reset your CampusBlog password

verifyEmail.intro: Verify your email address to activate CampusBlog sign-in.
verifyEmail.subject: Verify your CampusBlog email

userCenter.pageSubtitle: Review your current profile, quota usage, and the articles you have already drafted or published.
userCenter.avatarHint: PNG, JPG, or WebP. A square image works best.

userCenter.emptyBookmarked: You haven't bookmarked any posts yet.
